flavorLines: Doug bought another drill because the first drill looked lonely.
Doug says risk is just excitement with paperwork.
Doug arrives early, then improvises the rest.
bots.name: Doug

flavorLines: Marlene carries a checklist and a backup checklist.
Marlene treats clean corners like a moral duty.
bots.name: Marlene

flavor.description: Tiny public projects with very sincere committees.
Porches, fences, and well-meaning weekend projects.
Shops, studios, and coffee-powered deadlines.

strings.assignmentHint: Accept one contract, then work it in half-hour chunks.
strings.continueIncompatible: Old save detected. This build needs a fresh run for the new job flow.
strings.continueMissing: No compatible save found. Time to found a tiny empire.
strings.crewDeferred: Crews are deferred during the phased-job refactor.
strings.neutralLogFallback: The work progressed at the speed of weather.
strings.noContracts: No contracts available for this board.
strings.quickBuyDescription: Use spare hours to quick buy missing tools before committing to the job.
strings.subtitle: You do the work. The work happens.
strings.title: Error Hammer
strings.titleNameHint: Both player and company names are required to start.

flavor.description: A box of tiny promises for walls with trust issues.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought several little commitments.

flavor.description: Straight lumber with a modest sense of destiny.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought planks and future splinters.

flavor.description: Powdered permanence in a practical bag.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a future rock.

flavor.description: Screws, bolts, and tiny pieces of authority.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought industrial punctuation.

flavor.description: Metal elbows for doors and cabinets with ambitions.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought several quiet pivots.

flavor.description: A legal place for wires to have feelings.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought approved tiny housing for electricity.

flavor.description: Color management for surfaces that need closure.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a small apology for the wall.

flavor.description: Fittings, elbows, and controlled wet intentions.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought several future right angles.

flavor.description: Sticky optimism for elevated leaks.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought weather negotiations.

flavor.description: Tape, covers, and the paperwork version of caution.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought several less dramatic outcomes.

flavor.description: A squeezable argument against drafts and drips.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought adhesive diplomacy.

flavor.description: Corners, strips, and a second chance at neatness.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought decorative seriousness.

flavor.description: Coiled certainty for walls full of secrets.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought very organized lightning.

flavor.description: Makes gaps disappear and corners believable.
flavor.quip_break: The trigger now negotiates only with itself.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a paste launcher for tiny diplomacy.

flavor.description: Makes holes where plans become real.
flavor.quip_break: The drill now hums only in memory.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a very loud yes.

flavor.description: The classic argument with nails.
flavor.quip_break: The hammer retired after a long career in impact studies.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought confidence with a wooden handle.

flavor.description: Temporary altitude with permanent responsibility.
flavor.quip_break: The ladder is now two short ladders and a lesson.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought seventeen opportunities to hold still.

flavor.description: A bubble with strong opinions.
flavor.quip_break: The bubble escaped and took geometry with it.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought objective truth in a plastic tube.

flavor.description: Cuts boards and overconfidence to size.
flavor.quip_break: The saw has entered a contemplative, toothless phase.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought straight lines with a side of sawdust.

flavor.description: Turns tiny doubts into tight decisions.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought a polite spiral persuader.

flavor.description: Beeps confidently near walls and occasionally near hope.
flavor.quip_break: It now identifies only emotional support beams.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought electronic wall gossip.

flavor.description: For clean cuts and rough schedules.
flavor.quip_break: The blade retired to paper-only ambitions.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought precision with a pocket clip.

flavor.description: For nuts, bolts, and life adjustments.
flavor.quip_break: The wrench now mostly resembles intent.
flavor.quip_buy: You bought leverage and a mild shoulder workout.
